headline: New UPS revenue helps Cargojet overcome loss of China e-commerce volume
summary: Canada-based Cargojet is compensating for the loss of a major Chinese e-commerce shipper by concentrating on new business opportunities closer to home. The post New UPS revenue helps Cargojet overcome loss of China e-commerce volume appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Is United Parcel Service Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: As United Parcel Service has underperformed the broader S&P 500 Index, analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: UPS Resets Network Of The Future As Investors Weigh Margin Risks
summary: United Parcel Service (NYSE:UPS) is advancing its Network of the Future plan by closing up to 200 manual package sorting facilities. The company is moving more volume into automated hubs and restructuring its workforce to align with the new operating model. UPS is pursuing workforce reductions, including voluntary buyouts that target roughly 30,000 positions. These changes are part of a push to reshape costs and operations as parcel shipping continues to evolve. UPS sits at the center of...
